type.description: task=mandate/work-order; task_response=verdict/completion; session_activation=handoff activation block; gate_response=gate PASS/FAIL result; notification=informational no-response

expects_response.description: When true, sender session awaits a RESPONSE file; status auto-sets to AWAITING_RESPONSE

status.description: Delivery tracking state — managed by APScheduler msg_response_scan

responded_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp set by mark_response_received()

in_response_to.description: ID of the message this is responding to — used by task_response types for thread linking

activation_hint.description: Full activation block (copy-paste ready) for the recipient to start their work session. Used by /AOS_mail to display to the receiving team. ADR032 §3.5.

mandate_ref.description: Path to the formal mandate artifact this MSG delivers or references. Pattern: _COMMUNICATION/team_{ID}/MANDATE_*.md. Enables machine-readable MSG↔MANDATE linkage (G-6).
